channel.title: octantes.ar
channel.description: a multimedia web portal, no algorithms or middlemen

item.title: nubenueve - record store
item.description: record store website, cd's, vinyls and cassette tapes
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: bocetos
item.description: discarded presents, possible memories, and residual symbols
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: órbitas
item.description: loops that come full circle, pyramids from the drawer
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: browsewithscroll
item.description: tool to preview fonts and multimedia with scroll directly in the browser
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: arch-hud
item.description: suckless tool pack to turn arch linux into a heads up display
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: shadewithseal
item.description: playground to program and record GLSL fragment shaders directly in the browser
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: trackwithslate
item.description: simple tool to edit and organize CSV tabular data directly in the browser
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: geminis
item.description: my brother's music, alongside one of my own at the end
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: viñetas
item.description: instrumental album with experimental visualizer
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: dinamik - studio dev
item.description: branding and motion graphics project for a productivity software development company
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: cruzar - crypto cordillera
item.description: branding and motion graphics project for a datacenter service across the mountain range
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: en una - digital publication
item.description: branding and motion graphics project for a digital music magazine
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: virtual reality - the best applications
item.description: In conversations about virtual reality, software often takes a back seat. Let's review some interesting uses.
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: virtual reality - a contemporary future
item.description: Virtual reality is in a remarkably interesting place, we invite you to discover it.
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: seance
item.description: first album with the guitar plugged in and an experimental visualizer
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: abandonware - the permanence of the author
item.description: Abandonware occurs when art becomes tied to the advancement of technology, intensifying the difficulties of properly preserving it.
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: intellectual properties - do we need new IPs?
item.description: Nowadays, interest in intellectual properties has less to do with the particularities of the authors and more with hype.
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: microtransactions and their future
item.description: We explain the role of microtransactions within the industry and analyze the possible future of in-game monetization systems
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: six minutes older
item.description: six one-minute midi experiments
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: kena - is it ok for aesthetics to be everything?
item.description: Within the framework Kena offers us, we bring up the debate between graphics versus content. Is it wrong for a game to be just pretty?
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)

item.title: mood worktapes
item.description: my first album, learning to use ableton live
item.author: kaste@octantes.ar (kaste)
